Subscribe for $30 / year — New Critic paid subscribers get access to Postscript, our interview series, Contra, our criticism section, and exclusive New Critic parties.

Subscribe
Luddite Clubmadeline

Luddite Club

JUN 30 · MADELINE · 22

“I haven’t remotely gone full-force into Luddism. Despite that, I’m here in New York at the Summer of Ludd to sing, and dance, and philosophize with the rest of them.”

To celebrate our readers, fellow editors, and many esteemed contributors, The New Critic will party in New York on July 18th from 8 p.m. to 1 a.m.

There WILL be an open bar. There WILL be dancing. There will be no stuffiness, no readings, no roundtables, no lectures, no talks, no panels, no presentations, and no sitting down.

Register now!
